context: Tests whether the agent routes a runtime/incident-triage question to pubnub-history with the get_pubnub_messages MCP tool, producing a tight handoff suitable for on-call use.

checklist.name: Uses handoff template
checklist.description: Output contains all five labeled lines (Intent, Skill, MCP tool, Docs source, Next step) in order

checklist.name: MCP tool is get_pubnub_messages
checklist.description: The MCP tool line names get_pubnub_messages

checklist.name: Recognizes runtime/triage framing
checklist.description: Either the Intent line or the Next step line characterizes this as runtime inspection or incident triage, not as a design/architecture question

checklist.name: Next step references the channel and time window
checklist.description: Next step explicitly mentions the channel name (support-incidents-prod) and/or the time window (last hour)

checklist.name: Docs source is appropriate
checklist.description: Docs source line is either 'n/a' (runtime triage has no docs surface) or History/Storage docs — not an unrelated docs surface like Chat SDK or Functions

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: Output contains no code blocks implementing the fetch

checklist.name: Single handoff
checklist.description: Output contains exactly one handoff block

checklist.name: Concise
checklist.description: Output is tight and on-call-friendly (not a long preamble before the handoff)
